zh.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade是Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton的女兒，於1146年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。她於1166年之前與Walchelin de Ferriers在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1210年在英國英格蘭盧特藍德歐阿哈姆享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade是Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton的女儿，于1146年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。她于1166年之前与Walchelin de Ferriers在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1210年在英国英格兰盧特藍德歐阿哈姆享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade was born in 1146, in Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton. She married Walchelin de Ferriers before 1166, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1210, in Oakham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade est née en 1146, à Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton. Elle a épousé Walchelin de Ferriers avant 1166, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1210, à Oakham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade wurde 1146 in Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton geboren. Sie hat vor 1166 in England, United Kingdom Walchelin de Ferriers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1210 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Oakham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade è nata il nel 1146 nel Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton. Lei sposato Walchelin de Ferriers prima del 1166, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1210, nel Oakham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lecheladeは1146年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスでAlanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stantonの娘として生まれた。1166年以前にイギリスイギリスでWalchelin de Ferriersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1210年にイギリスイギリスルトランドオアクハムで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade(은)는 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1166년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Walchelin de Ferriers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 카에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade nasceu em 1146, em Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton. Ela casou-se com Walchelin de Ferriers antes 1166, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1210, em Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade родилась в 1146 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walchelin de Ferriers перед 1166 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1210 г. в местности оахам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Lechelade nació en 1146, en Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Alanus "Wargus" Leke 2nd Lord of Leche, 2nd lord-keeper of Stanton. Se casó con Walchelin de Ferriers antes de 1166, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1210, en Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
